current.html.keywords: Current APIs The current API set includes core Autofac and all .NET core-compatible assemblies. These are things that can generally be used cross-platform and do not include Windows / .NET desktop framework components. Use the navigation tree to explore namespaces.

legacy-framework.html.title: Legacy .NET Framework Integrations | Autofac
legacy-framework.html.keywords: Legacy .NET Framework Integrations The classic/legacy API set includes Windows-only / .NET desktop framework components and integrations like MVC 5, Web API 2, WCF, SignalR, and related packages. While you may also be able to use some of the current APIs on Windows with the classic .NET framework, you won't be able to use these legacy integrations with newer .NET core projects. Use the navigation tree to explore namespaces.
